prestazioni: M178 LS2 (4.0L V8 Biturbo) engine: Full carbon-fiber intake manifold upgrade by Mercedes-AMG Performance Studio (P50 limited-run component, reducing weight by 3.2kg while improving throttle response at 7,000+ RPM)

Garrett GT35R 84mm turbochargers with billet compressor wheels (replacing stock M178 turbos) paired with custom 4-ply silicone charge pipes by Vibrant Performance, supporting 2.2 bar boost for 850+ HP on 100-octane fuel

Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression) and 20mm adjustable ride height, paired with AMG-specific spherical bearing top mounts by H&R for subframe rigidity enhancement
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (AMG GT Black Series-specific) with carbon-fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, increasing track width by 65mm for 325/30R20 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires
APR Performance GTC-300 carbon-fiber rear wing with 3D-printed titanium endplates (adjustable from 0-25 degrees) and integrated Gurney flap for 400+ lbs of downforce at 180 mph
Custom titanium exhaust system by Akrapovic (M178-specific) with quad 102mm carbon-fiber tips, replacing the stock rear valance for a 12kg weight reduction and 18% flow improvement at 8,000 RPM
